provided."}],"NoTransferProposed()":[{"notice":"Thrown when no transfer is proposed for a given action."}],"NotOperator()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller is not an operator."}],"NotRouterAdmin()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller lacks the ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE."}],"NotWalletRouter()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the caller is not the WalletRouter contract."}],"OldAdminLacksDefaultAdminRole()":[{"notice":"Thrown when an old admin address lacks the DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE during a role transition."}],"OnlyRouterAdmin()":[{"notice":"Thrown when a address."}],"RecipientMismatch()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the recipient address does not match the proposed action recipient in Timelock."}],"RecoverFundsNotExecuted()":[{"notice":"Thrown when fund recovery execution fails in Timelock."}],"SetWalletRouterNotExecuted()":[{"notice":"Thrown when WalletRouter setting execution fails in Timelock."}],"TimelockNotExpired()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to execute a Timelock action before the delay period expires."}],"TokenAlreadySupported()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to add a token that is already supported."}],"TokenIsNotAContract()":[{"notice":"Thrown when a provided token address is not a contract."}],"TokenMismatch()":[{"notice":"Thrown when the provided token does not match the proposed fails."}],"VaultHasETHBalance()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to remove a token with a non-zero ETH balance in the Vault."}],"VaultHasTokenBalance()":[{"notice":"Thrown when attempting to remove
